variants: Pavle Jovanovic is a dedicated member of the Noonbright Mapmakers, where he merges his interests in mapping and education. His field of expertise is in Curriculum Studies, nurtured under the mentorship of Umayma Noor, who has greatly influenced his academic journey. Significant backing from the Mapleforge Progress Fund allows Pavle to conduct research aimed at enhancing curriculum frameworks. In addition, he holds an Astrostatic Engineer Permit, which emphasizes his multifaceted skills in both educational and engineering domains.
